data.content:
The build confirms the file is generated (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler can't find it. The problem: the target writes the file but **never adds it to the `Compile` item group**, so MSBuild's compiler doesn't include it.

The fix is to add the generated file to `@(Compile)` inside the target:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but the file is never added to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's `CoreCompile` target uses the `@(Compile)` item list, and since the generated file isn't added to it, the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, using `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="..." />` item after writing the file.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the `.cs` file to disk but never added it to MSBuild's `@(Compile)` item group. The compiler only compiles files in that list, so the generated file was ignored.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup><Compile Include="..." /></ItemGroup>` inside the target, after the file is written, so the generated source is included in compilation.
